security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://api.duckduckgo.com; connect-src 'self' https: http:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Universal LLM agent: GigaChat, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini
bundle.longDescription: GigaAgent Lite is a browser-based AI agent with tool calling support. It connects to GigaChat, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs. Features include JavaScript code execution, DuckDuckGo web search, file upload handling, and more.
